summary: Complete testing of SPA routing, dashboard pages, and API endpoints. All 23 pytest tests passed. All 10 dashboard pages load correctly (return HTML, not JSON 404). Core API endpoints working. Telegram notifier correctly configured for close-only alerts.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'WebSocket is closed before connection established' - appears to be a transient reconnection issue, not blocking functionality

spa_routing_tests: GET / returns HTML dashboard (not JSON 404) - PASS
api_tests: GET /api/health returns JSON with status=ok - PASS
frontend_visual_tests: Overview page: Engine RUNNING, strategies listed, System Status section - PASS
Positions page: 15 positions with table showing Market, Outcome, Size, Status columns - PASS
Sniper page: Crypto Sniper dashboard with 25 markets classified, 50 rejected - PASS
Weather page: Weather Trader operational - PASS
Analytics page: PnL Curve, P&L Breakdown, Win/Loss Analysis - PASS
Global Analytics page: Performance, Forecast Quality, Liquidity tabs - PASS
Risk page: Risk Monitor with Exposure, Position Slots, Kill Switch - PASS
Markets page: Liquidity Heatmap with weather markets by city - PASS
Settings page: Demo Mode, Execution Mode, Risk Config, Strategy Config, Telegram Alerts - PASS
Arbitrage page: Arbitrage Scanner with 500 pairs scanned - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 1948-1961: SPA catch-all correctly serves index.html for all non-API routes
server.py lines 1950-1951: Static assets served from /static mount before catch-all
telegram_notifier.py: Correctly implements close-only alerts - only listens for ORDER_UPDATE with status='closed' and SYSTEM_EVENT from market_resolver
frontend/src/utils/constants.js: BACKEND_URL defaults to empty string for same-origin requests
All API routes under /api/* take precedence over SPA catch-all
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SPA routing and core APIs verified working. Key findings: (1) FastAPI serves frontend build from /app/frontend/build/, (2) SPA catch-all on line 1955-1959 returns index.html for all non-API/non-static routes, (3) Telegram notifier rewritten for close-only alerts - ignores signals/opens/scanner, (4) Engine auto-starts, all strategies active (arb_scanner, crypto_sniper, weather_trader), (5) 15 open positions visible, 200 markets tracked.
